triggers toggle now.

design: add dark/light theme system with next-themes

Install next-themes, add ThemeProvider + ThemeToggle, define CSS
design tokens for both modes in globals.css, migrate ~1500 hardcoded
colors to semantic tokens across all components. Sidebar is light in
light mode, dark navy in dark mode. All color-coded elements (badges,
file types, status indicators) use dark: variants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Rename package from com.notification to org.notification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Grafana dashboard by setting datasource UID and enabling histogram metrics

Dashboard panels referenced datasource uid "prometheus" but the
provisioned datasource had no explicit UID. Also enabled percentiles
histogram for HTTP server requests so p95/p99 latency panels have data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Redis cache serialization by using JSON instead of JDK serializer

The default JdkSerializationRedisSerializer requires cached objects to
implement Serializable. Entity classes (User, Device, NotificationTemplate)
don't, causing every @Cacheable call to fail with SerializationException
and resulting in 100% load test failures. Switch to
GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer. Also promote load-client error
logging from DEBUG to ERROR for better visibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace wildcard imports with explicit single-class imports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add healthcheck to notification-server for load-client readiness

The load-client was starting before the notification-server Spring Boot
app was ready, causing 100% request failures. Use actuator health
endpoint as healthcheck and require service_healthy condition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Docker build by generating per-service settings.gradle

Each Dockerfile was copying the shared settings.gradle which references
all subprojects, but only one subproject's source was available during
build. Generate a minimal settings.gradle with only the target subproject.

Place multi-take variants sequentially on one track instead of parallel lanes

be reviewed without muting tracks or toggling visibility.

commit.message:
Fix deploy script: run commands as root instead of nologin user

The autograder system user has /usr/sbin/nologin as shell, so sudo -u
autograder fails. Run deploy commands as root since the script already
requires sudo. Services still run as autograder via systemd User= directive.

commit.message:
fix: HubSpot htmlBody injecté dès le POST de création

Problème : htmlBody n'était pas dans le POST initial → HubSpot créait
l'email en mode template vierge, puis le PUT avec htmlBody seul était
ignoré car le mode template ne supporte pas htmlBody partiel.

Correctif :
- htmlBody inclus dès le payload du POST (force mode Custom HTML)
- richTextBody supprimé (champ invalide HubSpot)
- PUT utilise le même payload complet (nom + sujet + htmlBody)
- Réponse du PUT vérifiée avec console.warn si échec (non bloquant)

commit.message:
fix(api): resolve duplicate UserSession entity causing login failure

Two UserSession entities mapped to the same `user_sessions` table:
- users/entities/user.entity.ts (with lastActivityAt, deviceInfo)
- auth/entities/auth.entity.ts (without lastActivityAt)

TypeORM used the auth version's metadata, so createSession() silently
dropped lastActivityAt → NULL → NOT NULL violation on login.

Fix: merge all columns into the users entity, remove the duplicate
auth entity file, update auth.module.ts import.

Also reverts diagnostic error message enhancement.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Handle empty dataframes and single genomes in phylogeny functions (#356)

* Fix empty and single genome handling in dataframe reconstruction

Add early-return guards for empty DataFrames in surface_postprocess_trie
and its pandas counterpart to prevent crashes when:
- An empty genome set is passed (no rows)
- A single genome produces an empty tree after trunk deletion

Also adds regression tests for empty and single-genome cases in both
surface_build_tree and surface_unpack_reconstruct.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01LsRsKbS6bk8QbqNpxYzyPc

* Ensure empty results match non-empty output schema

- Fix surface_unpack_reconstruct empty return to use proper column
  names and types instead of alifestd_make_empty() (which produced
  wrong schema with ancestor_list/taxon_label instead of ancestor_id)
- Add _apply_empty_output_schema helper in surface_postprocess_trie
  to transform empty DataFrames with hstrat_rank and proper types
- Cast ancestor_id to Int64 in empty path to match phyloframe output
- Add schema-matching assertions to empty and single-genome tests
- Upgrade empty-input logging from info to warning
- Remove now-unused pandas/phyloframe imports from
  surface_unpack_reconstruct

https://claude.ai/code/session_01LsRsKbS6bk8QbqNpxYzyPc

* Use _join_user_defined_columns for empty path and enforce UInt64 ancestor_id

- Reuse _join_user_defined_columns in surface_unpack_reconstruct empty
  path instead of manual column forwarding, respecting drop_dstream_metadata
- Cast ancestor_id back to documented UInt64 after phyloframe processing
  (phyloframe's alifestd_assign_contiguous_ids converts to Int64 internally
  but no negative sentinel values are used)
- Apply same UInt64 cast in both empty and non-empty paths for consistency

https://claude.ai/code/session_01LsRsKbS6bk8QbqNpxYzyPc

* Simplify _apply_empty_output_schema per review feedback

- Assert df is empty at function entry
- Create hstrat_rank as empty UInt64 column directly instead of computing
  from dstream_rank - dstream_S
- Remove conditional guards on ancestor_id (always present per schema)
- Return drop result directly

https://claude.ai/code/session_01LsRsKbS6bk8QbqNpxYzyPc

* Consolidate ancestor_id casting per review feedback

- Fold ancestor_id cast into the with_columns call in _apply_empty_output_schema
- Use df.cast() instead of conditional with_columns in main path

https://claude.ai/code/session_01LsRsKbS6bk8QbqNpxYzyPc

* Remove assert verbosity

---------

commit.message:
Harden for production: security, sync, auth, and reliability fixes

- Firebase rules: require writerId === auth.uid, add array size limits
- Fix conflict resolution: skip conflicting fields instead of overwriting
- Auth: PBKDF2 (100k iterations + salt) replaces plain SHA-256
- Auth: sessionStorage instead of localStorage (auto-expires)
- Add CSP meta tag restricting script/style/connect sources
- Prevent iOS swipe-back in Speaker mode via preventDefault
- Flush pending writes immediately on mode switch
- Add prototype pollution guards on patch paths
- Remove redundant structuredClone in transactions

commit.message:
Persist session cookie and auto-show login dialog on expiry (#11)

* Persist session cookie and auto-show login dialog on expiry

- couchGetSession() now returns a discriminated SessionStatus union
  ('authenticated' | 'expired' | 'offline') so network errors no longer
  incorrectly trigger a login dialog when the device is offline
- checkSession() in auth store leaves isAuthenticated unchanged on 'offline',
  only clears it on confirmed 'expired'; returns SessionStatus for callers
- Added invalidateSession() to auth store for sync-layer use
- On startup, auto-show login dialog when session is confirmed expired
  (not when offline — app stays usable with local IndexedDB data)
- Visibility change handler re-checks session when PWA is foregrounded
  after being backgrounded overnight, showing login dialog if expired
- Keep-alive: pings /_session every 5 min while authenticated to refresh
  the CouchDB AuthSession cookie during active foreground use
- watch(isAuthenticated) now shows login dialog when session transitions
  from true→false during active use (e.g. 401 detected during PouchDB sync)
- Sync error/denied handlers detect 401/403 and call invalidateSession()
  instead of scheduling a retry

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MHGzG2eLdnQ6gsAn6VweFV

* Shut down sync immediately on 401/403 instead of delegating to App.vue watcher (#12)

* Initial plan

* Robustly shut down sync immediately on auth errors (401/403)

commit.message:
fix: ringtone plays again + bilateral hang-up via signaling

1. Ringtone: only set _killTimestamp when audio was actually playing.
   Defensive stopAllRingtones() calls (from resetCall) no longer block
   future ringtone plays with the 5-second anti-restart guard.

2. Bilateral hang-up: send 'hangup' signal via Supabase Realtime
   signaling channel BEFORE disconnecting WebRTC. The peer receives
   this immediately and triggers endCall(), instead of waiting up to
   30s for ICE state detection or relying on DB Realtime events.

commit.message:
fix: corregir flujo post-pago y mejorar UI páginas de retorno MP

- Fix bug crítico: restorePaymentResult se llamaba antes de que sessionStorage
  tuviera el resultado. Ahora se llama explícitamente desde success/failure/pending
  antes de router.push('/') para garantizar la transición a identity-verification
- Rediseño completo de páginas success/failure/pending: sin header/footer,
  iconos animados, barra de progreso, countdown en failure/pending, botón reintentar

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: persist Live Activity push token across app restarts

iOS only emits push token updates when a Live Activity is first created,
not when reconnecting to an existing one. After an app kill+restart,
currentPushToken was nil so the backend timer schedule was silently
skipped, preventing the APNS push that transitions the Live Activity
from timer view to the next set.

Persist the push token in LiveActivityCache (App Group UserDefaults)
and restore it immediately in reconnectLiveActivity().

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
